1 Repeatable to 6 credits

Other Requirements for the Major

See https://academiccatalog.umd.edu/undergraduate/colleges-schools/ engineering/ (https://academiccatalog.umd.edu/undergraduate/ colleges-schools/engineering/) for minimum grade requirements in key prerequisite courses for engineering students. Students should follow the sequence of courses as outlined in the aerospace engineering degree requirements and graduation plan.
